title: Give us feedback on the next big CRM Feature!
excerpt: The monday sales CRM team wants to hear you from you! We are working on two big mass emailing features allowing up to 2000 emails a day + email tracking and enabling email sequences.   Let us know your thoughts in this q…

posts.author: sashawe (Sasha)
posts.cookedHtml: The monday sales CRM team wants to hear you from you! We are working on two big mass emailing features allowing up to 2000 emails a day + email tracking and enabling email sequences. Let us know your thoughts in this quick form (one question only!) and get ready for great new features!

posts.author: ChristineWLF (Christine)
posts.cookedHtml:
That’s cool!

New ask request: we use this feature (emails & activities widget) more often to internally communication to support boards. The CRM opportunity creates tasks in other support boards thus an update notice won’t show on everyone’s support boards. Our work around is we use notes in the emails and activities widget to communicate so all can see discussion. I would LOVE to be able to mention a full team currently the @ only works by single person. Is this in the works?

posts.author: jauerbach123 (James Auerbach)
posts.cookedHtml:
It does not sense why the parent line has these features but the sub-items do not. Each sub-item is it’s own individual potential sale and has its own associated noted, email string, etc.

This one seems like a VERY EASY one to fix and add to the CRM quickly.

For some reason Sub-items in the CRM currently do NOT have the full Email & Activities options. Only a very basic note taking option.

  1. We NEED the full Email & Activity features for notes for all sub-items in the CRM
  2. This includes the ability to create a NEW EMAIL in the notes section for all sub-items in the CRM
  3. This includes the full ADD ACTIVITY options in the notes section for all sub-items in the CRM.
